Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-05-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Plaintiff Mark Stewart was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant State of California.
Default was entered against defendant on November 21, 2008.

Plaintiff introduced the following evidence:

Exhibit 1---Claim Rejection Letter from the State
of California dated July 3, 2008-----------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff mark Stewart, and against the Defaulted Defendant State of California as follows:

Damages/Principal - $0.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $0.00.

The Court shall prepare the Judgment After Hearing.
